description: You are a Radiologist performing a tumor response assessment for an oncology patient. RECIST 1.1 is the international standard for measuring tumor response to treatment and requires measuring the longest diameter of each target lesion in the axial plane. Using the CT scan located at /home/ga/DICOM/studies/oncology_ct/, identify and measure at least two distinct target lesions: one in the upper or mid-abdomen and a second at a different anatomical location. Export the CT slices showing these measurements to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/recist_lesion1.png and /home/ga/DICOM/exports/recist_lesion2.png. Write a RECIST assessment report to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/recist_report.txt including the anatomical location and diameter in mm for each lesion, the Sum of Longest Diameters (SLD), and a baseline assessment statement.
